{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323201539B10AA0043C1B4365A946"}"},"total":2150},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7434848354625962814","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常喜欢看的一部电视剧，现在以小说的形式展现给大家。新奇且令人期待的情节本人非常喜欢。没有夸张且低调的人设也是许多穿越小说没有的。电视机的结局早忘记了，最后说何雨柱冻死在桥洞？忘记了，期待作者大大有头有尾，给广大爱好者和喜欢你的读者一个满意且幸福的结局。我看了一下，还在连载中[委屈]，作者大大你要加速了，我们看小说可比你写的快多了！看不到结局睡不着啊[送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731065972,"group_id":"7412901630074440729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"积极乐观，必定风生水起，笔下生花，圆终生梦想！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9TiawKySfhER7rsov0r9Ms=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/45d866f529ab41e684abe1482f939d4c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793742&x-signature=g4rPfF5%2BTwoydjaIqabjalkRAVA%3D","user_id":"86476654424","user_name":"口袋里没米"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86476654424","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7412901630074440729","book_info":{"abstract":"【弱系统文】21世纪的外卖小哥儿发生意外穿越到了禽满四合院的世界，开局正好是道德天尊PUA傻柱给贾家带饭盒的日子。
饭盒？我自己吃他不香吗？擦，我都有系统了，还吃个屁饭盒。
穷鬼穿越，只有一个生活物品系统，那就老老实实在这个时代苟着就行，没必要打打杀杀，但是远离寡妇，尤其是黑寡妇！
如果易中海收养了孩子
刘海忠的儿子都跑了、
闫埠贵的儿子也跑了，那么四合院会不会很热闹？
一血达人许大茂如果有了个厉害的媳妇儿，那他还能总能拿一血吗？
哎，何雨柱穿越过去究竟会怎么样？还是让咱们拭目以待吧！

":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":28,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31128,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":41091},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1731067908,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7443247571831276312","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"没看过四合院的电视剧，头一次看这本书，所以没有那么多的有色眼镜，单看剧情其实蛮平滑的，但耐看，看了两天，从头到尾看完了，写的还是很不错的，至于其他评论的大圣父或者说作者硬洗白聋老太太的，我感觉没必要，但从这本书来看，这个小说蛮成功的，作者加油[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]","text_exts":[{"e":6,"s":3,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742681394365A946%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227443247571831276312%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227412901630074440729%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733019898,"group_id":"7412901630074440729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7uIxX+12pjJv0Y8PdfCr4ndiyACVG9jMKuTp3QNG3mq","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/aff1edce04e143f086fe1449fae1f00f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791904&x-signature=4yvm1omvMlKG5gZA3W2IiVjhNDY%3D","user_id":"1410029800393853","user_name":"爱足浴的雷少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1410029800393853","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"
